zh.lifeSummary: 當John Davenport Esq.於1480年出生在英國爾達文波特時，他的父親Ralph Davenport39歲，母親Margery Davenport27歲。他於1496年與Katharine Radcliffe在英國英格蘭藍卡爾奧爾德薩爾結婚。他去世於1554年5月25日在他的家鄉享年74歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Davenport Esq.于1480年出生在英国爾達文波特时，他的父亲Ralph Davenport39岁，母亲Margery Davenport27岁。他于1496年与Katharine Radcliffe在英国英格兰藍卡爾奧爾德薩爾结婚。他去世于1554年5月25日在他的家乡享年74岁。

nameMeanings.name: Davenport
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire and Cheshire): habitational name from a place in Cheshire named Davenport, from the Dane river (apparently named with a Celtic cognate of Middle Welsh dafnu ‘to drop, to trickle’) + Old English port ‘market town’.

Irish: in Tipperary, this is an English surname adopted by bearers of Munster Gaelic Ó Donndubhartaigh ‘descendant of Donndubhartach’, a personal name composed of the elements donn ‘brown-haired man’ or ‘chieftain’ + dubh ‘black’ + artach ‘nobleman’.
History: John Davenport (died 1670) arrived in Boston, MA, in 1637. He came of an English Cheshire family associated with Capesthorne Hall, near Macclesfield.

variants.name: Devenport
meanings: English and Irish (Lancashire): variant of Davenport . The spelling Devonport is found in Ireland and it may have been this form which gave rise to Devenport.

variants.name: Dunworth
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Eamon, Niall.
Irish: adopted in Ireland by bearers of Gaelic Ó Donndubhartaigh (see Davenport 2).
English: perhaps a variant of Dungworth, see Dunsworth .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: When John Davenport Esq. was born in 1480, in Davenport, Cheshire, England, his father, Ralph Davenport, was 39 and his mother, Margery Davenport, was 27. He married Katharine Radcliffe in 1496, in Ordsall, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. He died on 25 May 1554, in his hometown, at the age of 74.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Davenport Esq. est né en 1480, à Davenport, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Ralph Davenport, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Margery Davenport, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Katharine Radcliffe en 1496, à Ordsall, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé le 25 mai 1554, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 74 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Davenport Esq. 1480 in Davenport, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ralph Davenport 39 und seine Mutter Margery Davenport 27. Er hat 1496 in Ordsall, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom Katharine Radcliffe geheiratet. Er starb am 25. Mai 1554 im Alter von 74 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Davenport Esq. è nato il nel 1480 nel Davenport, Cheshire, England, il suo padre, Ralph Davenport, aveva 39 anni e il suo madre, Margery Davenport, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Katharine Radcliffe nel 1496, nel Ordsall, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì il 25 maggio 1554, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 74 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Davenport Esq.が1480年にイギリスチェシュアイアダベンプオルトで生まれた時，父Ralph Davenportは39歳，母Margery Davenportは27歳であった。1496年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアオルドサルでKatharine Radcliffeと結婚した。彼は1554年5月25日に故郷で74歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Davenport Esq.(이)가 1480년 영국 체실르 대븐포트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ralph Davenport(은)는 39세였고, 그의 어머니 Margery Davenport(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1496년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 르드사에서 Katharine Radcliffe(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1554년 5월 25일 그의 고향에서 74세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Davenport Esq. nasceu em 1480, em Davenport, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Ralph Davenport, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Margery Davenport, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Katharine Radcliffe em 1496, em Ordsall, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu em 25 de maio de 1554, em sua cidade natal, com 74 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Davenport Esq. родился в 1480 г. в местности давенпорт, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Ralph Davenport было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Margery Davenport, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Katharine Radcliffe в 1496 г. в местности ордсалл, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. Он умер 25 мая 1554 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 74 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Davenport Esq. nació en 1480, en Davenport, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Ralph Davenport, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Margery Davenport, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Katharine Radcliffe en 1496, en Ordsall, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Murió el 25 de mayo de 1554, en su pueblo, a la edad de 74 años.
